must_not_assert: AD enumeration or reconnaissance by an attacker (this is the DC's own machine account performing LSA RPC + Group Policy)

the_trap: IPC$\lsarpc access resembles SharpHound-style AD enumeration, but it is the DC's OWN machine account (WIN-DC-...$) doing routine LSA RPC plus SYSVOL Group Policy (gpt.ini) reads.
rationale: Every 5145 access is by the DC machine account: IPC$\lsarpc (A0, EV-004..007) and SYSVOL\Policies gpt.ini (EV-001..003). lsarpc access resembles AD-enumeration tooling, but the machine-account subject and Group-Policy targets are decisive benign context: routine domain-controller activity.
